libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Configure generated JVM tests with module opens when exercising OGNL reflection internals: --add-opens=java.base/java.lang=ALL-UNNAMED and, for collection/JDK-internal accessor coverage, --add-opens=java.base/java.util=ALL-UNNAMED. No Docker image, extra Maven dependency, environment variable, or global system property is required. Do not set ognl.security.manager globally; if testing that mode, set and restore it inside the individual test.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7430 [Automation] java run fails for ognl:ognl:3.3.5; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: JDK 25 SecurityManager removal/deprecation behavior may make existing security-manager-focused tests fail independently of setup.
org.javassist:javassist:3.29.0-GA is already a transitive runtime dependency of ognl:ognl:3.3.5, so adding it explicitly would likely be redundant unless Gradle resolution proves otherwise.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: OGNL is an in-memory expression/reflection library with only a transitive javassist runtime dependency, but its own JDK17+ test profile requires module opens for reflective coverage.
